data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Shows Its Strength; Nvidia, Palantir Make These Moves (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase following unexpected inflation data. Google's stock reached an early purchasing point. In the latest stock market update, the Nasdaq demonstrated its strength, with notable movements from companies like Nvidia and Palantir.

data.title: Geron Corporation Reports Inducement Grant Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On April 14, 2026, in Foster City, California, Geron Corporation (Nasdaq: GERN) announced an equity award to Timothy Williams, their newly appointed Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer, and Corporate Secretary. This award takes the form of a stock option enabling the purchase of 2,500,000 shares of Geron common stock. The grant was made to secure William's commitment to joining Geron as a senior executive.
D-Wave CEO Warns Nvidia: Quantum Computers Are Coming For You

data.title: Bears Pounce On Avis Budget, Lucid, MARA — Short Interest In These 10 Stocks Soars Above 40%
data.description: Traders are focusing on stocks with high short interest following recent data from FINRA showing significant increases in bearish positions in various mid- and large-cap companies. LCID stock is on the move, with Choice Hotels International (CHH) and Avis Budget Group (CAR) now leading the list with short interest exceeding 50% of float. Lucid Group (LCID) and a number of travel, cryptocurrency, and semiconductor firms are also seen as potential targets for short squeezes due to their elevated short interest and substantial market capitalizations. The top 10 most heavily shorted stocks (market caps above $2 billion, average 14-day volume above 5 million, and free floats above 5 million) include CHH, Avis Budget Group, and others. Data sourced from Benzinga Pro as of April 14, 2026, indicates the current market situation.

data.title: Inseego Corp. to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Inseego Corp. (Nasdaq: INSG) shared plans to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026, concluding on March 31, 2026, post the markets shut on May 7, 2026. Inseego is distinguished globally for its proficiency in 5G mobile broadband and fixed wireless access (FWA) solutions.

data.title: Biggest Industrial IPO Since 1999, And Investors Are Buying
data.description: The latest IPO in the industrial sector has become the largest in the United States in 2026, raising significant capital. With investors showing strong interest, this IPO marks the largest in the industry since UPS raised $5.5 billion in 1999. This news has garnered attention, emphasizing the excitement among investors.

data.title: Lakeland Fire + Safety discloses fiscal Q4 & full year 2026 financial performance.
data.description: A recent report reveals a significant increase in the number of coronavirus cases in the country, with over 10,000 new cases being reported in the last 24 hours. The total number of confirmed cases now stands at more than 200,000, with the death toll surpassing 5,000. This surge in cases has put immense pressure on the healthcare system, leading to shortages in medical supplies and hospital beds. Authorities have urged the public to adhere to safety measures such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, vaccination efforts are being ramped up in an attempt to control the situation.

data.title: Tesla, SpaceX Search For Suppliers For Elon Musk's Terafab Project: Report
data.description: Employees involved in Elon Musk's Terafab project have been contacting suppliers of semiconductor manufacturing equipment. Tesla's stock has surged by over 11% this week. Both Tesla and SpaceX are seeking suppliers for Elon Musk's Terafab Project, as per reports.

data.title: BTC mining difficulty drops by 1.1% to 135.5T; Miners sell over 32,000 BTC in Q1 2026, surpassing 2025 total.
data.description: On Saturday, the Bitcoin mining difficulty dropped to 135.5 trillion. In the first quarter of 2026, public miners managed to sell over 32,000 Bitcoins. This figure surpasses the total amount of Bitcoin sold throughout the entirety of 2025.

data.title: Inocras and Broad Institute Researchers Present New TCGA Whole-Genome Cancer Insights, Accelerating Discovery in Cancer Genomics
data.description: In a joint effort between Inocras, a bioinformatics company focused on leveraging whole-genome data and advanced analytics for precision health, and the Broad Institute of MIT and Harvard, researchers will be presenting findings from a collaborative project at the AACR Annual Meeting 2026 in San Diego. This partnership has yielded significant insights from one of the most extensive analyses of cancer whole-genome data to date, involving over 8,000 samples. The focus of this initiative is to further understanding in the field of cancer genomics and explore new avenues for precision medicine.

data.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty drops with average block time at 9.8 minutes, close to 10-minute target. Difficulty likely to rise next.
data.description: The current average block time, as reported, stands at approximately 9.8 minutes, slightly below the targeted 10-minute block time. This data comes from CoinWarz.

data.title: Compass Pathways Commends White House Executive Order to Accelerate Research and Access for Psychedelic Treatments
data.description: A biotech company, Compass Pathways plc (Nasdaq: CMPS), applauds the White House Executive Order aimed at expediting medical treatments for serious mental illnesses. This order acknowledges the critical need for addressing the mental health crisis affecting millions of Americans. Compass Pathways, dedicated to enhancing patient access to evidence-based innovations, supports the recognition of FDA-approved psychedelics for their potential impact on mental health.

data.title: Haloid Solutions Expands Access to Radio Equipment by Offering Flexible Financing and Leasing Solutions Named HaloidFLEX
data.description: On April 18, 2026, in New York, Haloid Solutions announced a new initiative to assist businesses and municipalities in procuring essential communication equipment, even amidst financial limitations. Through its HaloidFLEX program, specialized financing and leasing options are now available to help facilitate access to these resources.

data.title: Fresh Faces, New Perspectives: Diversity Among New REALTORS® in 2024
data.description: In the 2024 NAR Member Profile, it was highlighted that the new REALTORS® joining the association exhibit greater diversity compared to their more experienced peers. This diversity trend is significant, with a higher representation of people from various backgrounds entering the profession. This finding sheds light on the changing demographics within the real estate industry, indicating a shift towards increased inclusivity among new NAR members.

data.title: Guggenheim Investments Again Ranked Among Top Taxable Bond Fund Families by Barron's
data.description: Company secures its fourth top-five ranking since 2020, with three years holding the top position. The firm's consistent success in the past years showcases its impressive performance and competitive edge in the industry.

data.title: Instant Reaction: CPI, August 14, 2024
data.description: Recent data released on August 14, 2024 indicates a stabilization in inflation, as reflected in the Consumer Price Index (CPI). This development suggests a more tranquil economic environment, potentially paving the way for the Federal Reserve to commence a series of interest rate cuts beginning in September. Chief Economist Lawrence Yun expressed optimism regarding this favorable trend in inflation numbers.
Stantec renews share buyback program and initiates an Automatic Share Purchase Plan. #stocks #investment

data.title: Novonesis issues EUR 1.7 billion senior unsecured notes
data.description: Novonesis, operated through Novozymes A/S, effectively priced and concluded the sale of EUR 1.7 billion senior unsecured notes, referred to as the "Notes," on March 12, 2026. This offering took place within the recently launched EUR 4 billion Euro Medium Term Note (EMTN) Programme, which was initiated on March 10, 2026.

data.title: Labrador Gold Announces Closing of Change of Business and Acquisition of Units of Northern Shield
data.description: On March 9, 2026, Labrador Gold Corp. (TSX.V: LAB | FNR: 2N6) received final approval from the TSX Venture Exchange for its Change of Business to a hybrid Mining/investment issuer, approved by shareholders on February 24, 2026. The Board of Directors elected at the Meeting includes Roger Moss, James Borland, Leo Karabelas, and Kevin Ramsay. The decision was made to maintain the company name as Labrador Gold Corp. The halt on the company's common shares will be lifted and trading will commence as a hybrid Mining/investment issuer under the symbol “LAB” on Wednesday, March 11, 2026.
RCI Banque to issue EUR 600M fixed rate notes maturing in May 2034.
